If provided, the 'orderBy' also needs to be provided.","enum":["ASC","DESC"],"type":"string"},"labels":{"description":"Filter by labels","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"orderBy":{"description":"Order issues by field. If provided, the 'direction' also needs to be provided.","enum":["CREATED_AT","UPDATED_AT","COMMENTS"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Repository owner","type":"string"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"repo":{"description":"Repository name","type":"string"},"since":{"description":"Filter by date (ISO 8601 timestamp)","type":"string"},"state":{"description":"Filter by state, by default both open and closed issues are returned when not provided","enum":["OPEN","CLOSED"],"type":"string"}},"required":["owner","repo"],"type":"object"},"name":"list_issues"},{"annotations":{"readOnlyHint":true,"title":"Search issues"},"description":"Search for issues in GitHub repositories using issues search syntax already scoped to is:issue","icons":[{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"light"},{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"dark"}],"inputSchema":{"properties":{"order":{"description":"Sort order","enum":["asc","desc"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Optional repository owner. 2026-03-13T07:20:21.1560470Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-13T07:18:32.340488467Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57058,\"title\":\"[Mgmt Generator Bug] Derived type constructor passes wrong type to flattened base constructor\",\"body\":\"## Bug Description\\n\\nWhen a derived model inherits from a flattened base type, the generated public constructor passes the unflattenable inner model type (`DataConnectorDataTypeCommon`) to the base constructor, but the base public constructor expects the flattened convenience type (`SecurityInsightsDataTypeConnectionState?`). This causes CS1503 build errors.\\n\\n## Impact\\n\\n**1 file** affected in SecurityInsights migration (#56944), but likely affects any similar inheritance pattern with flattened properties.\\n\\n## How to Reproduce\\n\\n1. Clone `azure-sdk-for-net` and `azure-rest-api-specs`\\n2. Checkout branch `securityinsights-typespec-migration` in azure-sdk-for-net\\n3. Checkout branch `securityinsights-csharp-migration` in azure-rest-api-specs\\n4. Run code generation:\\n```bash\\ncd sdk/securityinsights/Azure.ResourceManager.SecurityInsights/src\\ndotnet build /t:GenerateCode /p:LocalSpecRepo=/specification/securityinsights/resource-manager/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/SecurityInsights\\n```\\n5. Build: `dotnet build`\\n6. Observe CS1503 in `Models/MCASDataConnectorDataTypes.cs`\\n\\n## Root Cause\\n\\n`MCASDataConnectorDataTypes` extends `SecurityInsightsAlertsDataTypeOfDataConnector`. The base type has a flattened public constructor that takes `SecurityInsightsDataTypeConnectionState?`, but the derived type\\u0026#39;s generated constructor passes the unflattened inner type `DataConnectorDataTypeCommon`.\\n\\n**Example:** `Models/MCASDataConnectorDataTypes.cs` (line 20):\\n```csharp\\npublic partial class MCASDataConnectorDataTypes : SecurityInsightsAlertsDataTypeOfDataConnector\\n{\\n    public MCASDataConnectorDataTypes(DataConnectorDataTypeCommon alerts) : base(alerts)  // BUG\\n```\\n\\nBase type public constructor:\\n```csharp\\npublic SecurityInsightsAlertsDataTypeOfDataConnector(SecurityInsightsDataTypeConnectionState? alertsState)\\n```\\n\\nTypes involved:\\n- **Passed:** `DataConnectorDataTypeCommon` (the full inner model)\\n- **Expected:** `SecurityInsightsDataTypeConnectionState?` (the flattened convenience parameter)\\n\\n## Expected Behavior\\n\\nThe derived constructor should either:\\n- Accept the flattened convenience parameter type and pass it through, or\\n- Accept the inner model and extract the flattened property to pass to base\\n\\n## Affected Files\\n\\n- `Models/MCASDataConnectorDataTypes.cs`\\n\\nAlso related: `TiTaxiiDataConnectorDataTypesTaxiiClient.cs` has AZC0005/AZC0007 errors (missing public/protected constructors), which may share the same root cause.\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57058\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"live1206\",\"id\":5196139,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/live1206\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5196139?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\",\"SecurityInsights\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-13T07:16:09Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-13T07:16:36Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

2026-03-13T07:20:21.1648896Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-13T07:19:28.246953142Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"safeoutputs","payload":{"id":3,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"result\":\"success\"}","type":"text"}],"isError":false}}}
2026-03-13T07:20:21.1673225Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-13T07:19:59.293741561Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage\n\n**Summary:** This is a confirmed code generation bug in the Azure Management Plane Generator (`eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt`). When a derived model inherits from a base type that has a **flattened property** in its public constructor, the generated derived constructor incorrectly passes the raw inner model type (`DataConnectorDataTypeCommon`) instead of the already-flattened convenience type (`SecurityInsightsDataTypeConnectionState?`), causing a `CS1503` build error.\n\nThe issue is well-scoped, includes a root cause analysis, and is filed by a team member. It's tracked under the SecurityInsights migration (#56944).\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e🔍 Technical Analysis\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n### Root Cause\n\nThe bug lies in how the mgmt generator resolves constructor parameter types for derived types when the base type uses **property flattening**:\n\n- **Base type** `SecurityInsightsAlertsDataTypeOfDataConnector` has a flattened public constructor accepting `SecurityInsightsDataTypeConnectionState? alertsState` (the convenience type extracted from the inner model).\n- **Derived type** `MCASDataConnectorDataTypes` is generated with a constructor that calls `base(alerts)` where `alerts` is `DataConnectorDataTypeCommon` — the raw inner model — instead of the flattened `SecurityInsightsDataTypeConnectionState?` value.\n\nThe generator likely:\n1. Finds the base constructor signature\n2. Resolves the parameter type from the model's wire/JSON schema (the inner type) rather than from the already-generated flattened public API\n\n**Secondary issue:** `TiTaxiiDataConnectorDataTypesTaxiiClient.cs` has `AZC0005`/`AZC0007` errors (missing public/protected constructors), which may also be caused by similar constructor generation logic failing to account for flattened properties.\n\n### Affected Generator Area\n\nThe bug likely resides in the constructor generation logic for derived types in the mgmt generator. Key files to investigate:\n\n- `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/` — look for constructor-generation visitors or providers\n- Specifically code that handles `FlattenedPropertiesVisitor` or `ConstructorProvider` for derived types\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e🪲 Reproduction Steps\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n1. Clone `azure-sdk-for-net` and check out branch `securityinsights-typespec-migration`\n2. Clone `azure-rest-api-specs` and check out branch `securityinsights-csharp-migration`\n3. Run:\n   ```bash\n   cd sdk/securityinsights/Azure.ResourceManager.SecurityInsights/src\n   dotnet build /t:GenerateCode /p:LocalSpecRepo=\u003cpath\u003e/specification/securityinsights/resource-manager/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/SecurityInsights\n   dotnet build\n   ```\n4. Observe `CS1503` in `Models/MCASDataConnectorDataTypes.cs` line 20\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e🛠️ Debugging Strategies\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n1. **Compare generated constructors**: Look at the generated constructors for both `SecurityInsightsAlertsDataTypeOfDataConnector` (base) and `MCASDataConnectorDataTypes` (derived) and trace how the generator determines the parameter type for the base call.\n\n2. **Search for similar patterns**: Look for other derived types inheriting from flattened-property base types across the SecurityInsights migration to identify all affected models.\n\n3. **Check `ConstructorProvider`**: In `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt`, trace how derived constructor initializers are built — specifically how it picks the type for the `base(...)` call. Compare with the base type's own constructor logic.\n\n4. **Unit test**: Write a unit test in the mgmt generator test suite with a minimal TypeSpec schema that has the same inheritance + flattening pattern to isolate the issue.\n\n5. **For the `AZC0005`/`AZC0007` side issue**: Check `TiTaxiiDataConnectorDataTypesTaxiiClient` — it may be missing its serialization constructor (protected/internal no-arg ctor). Compare its generated output against other types that generate correctly.\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e📋 Suggested Sub-Tasks\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n- [ ] Reproduce the `CS1503` error with the provided steps\n- [ ] Identify the generator code path that determines `base(...)` call parameter types in derived constructors for flattened base types\n- [ ] Fix the derived constructor to pass the flattened convenience type (or extract it from the inner model)\n- [ ] Investigate `TiTaxiiDataConnectorDataTypesTaxiiClient.cs` `AZC0005`/`AZC0007` issue for related root cause\n- [ ] Add a regression test in the mgmt generator test suite covering derived type + flattened base constructor pattern\n- [ ] Verify fix doesn't break other similarly structured models in other service migrations\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e🔗 Relevant Resources\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n- Parent SecurityInsights migration issue: #56944\n- Mgmt generator source: [`eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt)\n- [Property flattening patterns in mgmt generator](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src)\n- [MPG Migration skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/copilot-instructions.md)\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n","item_number":57058},"name":"add_comment"}}}
